changelog: Filmography page redesigned with bigger immersive cards: 4 columns × 2 rows = 8 results per page, full 2:3 movie posters that fill the entire card with title, year, and character name overlaid on a dark gradient at the bottom for guaranteed readability on any poster background. Status pill (CHECKING / IN LIBRARY / TAP TO REQUEST) is anchored to the top-right corner with its own colored background.
